Package org.eventb.core.seqprover.eventbExtensionTests.mbGoal

Class MembershipGoalImplTest

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.core.seqprover.eventbExtensionTests.mbGoal.AbstractMbGoalTests
org.eventb.core.seqprover.eventbExtensionTests.mbGoal.MembershipGoalImplTest
public class MembershipGoalImplTest extends AbstractMbGoalTests
Acceptance tests for the common implementation of the Membership Goal reasoner and tactic.
